handlers.create_channel: POST /api/channels — validates name (1-80 chars), inserts channel + owner as member, returns 201
handlers.list_channels: GET /api/channels — lists channels where user is member, returns role
handlers.get_channel: GET /api/channels/{id} — returns channel detail with role, 404 if not found, 403 if not member
handlers.update_channel: PATCH /api/channels/{id} — owner-only update of name/description, 403 for non-owner
